/usr/bin/gcc -g  -L/home/xiaoyubb/xiangmu/app_sdk_v2/platform/x86linux/lib -pthread CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_alarm.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_alarm_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_city_setting.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_main.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_seeting.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_time_setting.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_tomato_setting.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_wifi_setting.c.o CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/ui/page_yingxiang_setting.c.o  -o demo1  ../lvgl/liblvgl.a ../component/font/libfont.a ../component/wifi/libwifi.a ../component/net/libhttp.a ../platform/x86linux/src/liblvgl_porting.a -lSDL2 -lm -lpthread -lfreetype -lz -lwpa_client ../component/osal/libosal.a -lcjson -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lnghttp2 -ldl
